# Expected Value of Learning

## Definition

```text
EVL = E[value after information] − value before information − cost of learning
```

## Use

Run a test when:

```text
EVL > 0
```

Even if immediate profit is negative, learning can be positive.

## Examples

- Testing search demand for a new category.
- Testing whether demo-proof beats claim-proof.
- Testing if pricing visibility increases qualified signup.
